specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners in the Chesapeake Bay region and South Florida actually need — reliable work done right, without the runaround.

At Ben's Boatworks, we handle everything from detailed boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, underwater hull work, a malfunctioning marine air conditioning system diagnosed and repaired, or a head system that just won't cooperate sorted out, we bring the same level of care and technical know-how to every job. We understand that each system on your boat is connected, and we treat it that way.

We serve boat owners across a wide area — from the waters around Annapolis and the broader Chesapeake Bay communities to South Florida, covering a 60-mile radius of service wherever we operate. Our clients range from weekend cruisers to liveaboards to commercial vessel operators, and we've built a reputation for showing up prepared and getting the job done. Your boat represents a significant investment, and we take that seriously every time we step aboard.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, underwater diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving South Florida. Call today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers the structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical systems, and overall condition of a vessel — essential before a purchase, insurance renewal, or financing. Ben's Boatworks conducts detailed pre-purchase surveys and condition-and-value inspections to give boat owners and buyers an accurate, unbiased picture of what they're working with. A proper inspection can save thousands in unexpected repairs down the line.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow for hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, through-hull cleaning, and recovery work without hauling the vessel out of the water. Ben's Boatworks performs professional dive services to assess and address what's happening below the waterline, keeping your boat cleaner, more fuel-efficient, and protected from marine growth and corrosion. It's a practical, cost-effective alternative to a full haul-out for many routine underwater maintenance tasks.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems operate in a harsh, salt-air environment that accelerates wear on components like seawater pumps, condensers, evaporators, and refrigerant lines. Ben's Boatworks diagnoses and repairs marine HVAC and climate control systems, handling everything from routine maintenance and refrigerant recharging to full system troubleshooting and component replacement. Keeping your climate control system running efficiently matters whether you're dockside or underway.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation systems — including holding tanks, marine heads, through-hulls, seacocks, and waste management systems — require specialized knowledge to service correctly and in compliance with maritime regulations. Ben's Boatworks handles installation, repair, and maintenance of onboard sanitation systems, freshwater systems, and bilge plumbing to keep everything flowing properly and odor-free. A well-maintained sanitation system protects both your vessel and the waterways you cruise.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal maintenance
Marine head and holding tank repair or full sanitation system replacement
Through-hull and seacock inspection, service, and replacement
Propeller inspection and recovery diving for submerged equipment
Freshwater system troubleshooting and marine plumbing repair onboard
